Add Custom Certificate

Add a certificate that isn't in the standard template — e.g. a company-specific training, ECDIS type-specific course, local endorsement, or an extra course you took.

Скипи Моряк

Skipi - United Seafarers

version EMBED-TEST

New vault folders are named clearly, for example Skipi Seafarer - Tymur Rudov. When opening a vault, select that named folder.
Just exploring?
✕

Complete your Seafarer Profile

These details power Jobs and Mailings. They live only inside this vault on disk. Photo is optional — or skip for now and explore first.

Wrong profile, or just exploring?
On adds availability fields (phones, airports, available date, salary). Turn off to finish with just the basics.
A new version of Skipi Seafarer is available! ✕
📂 Drop the file to attach it to this certificate
